name: Mirror Abyss / 镜渊
closure_changes: preserve the rc.4.1 fact-index byId correction
reduce the small-summary total input budget from 12000 to 5000 characters
change the default small-summary trigger from 15 to 7 turns
change the default large-summary trigger from 6 to 4 committed small summaries
migrate only the old default 15/6 values once while preserving other user-customized thresholds
re-budget saved failed small-summary queues under the existing checkpoint restore path
print the exact current-batch source_fact_ids and source_row_ids allowlist before summary evidence
keep strict evidence-boundary validation and reject copied old-event or invented source IDs
preserve storage schema, current summaries, tables, event registry and lorebook state
validation: all eight exact core patches apply once and are idempotent
ambiguous or missing patch markers refuse startup
ES module syntax checks for core-hotfix.js and finalizer.js
manifest, build and rollback metadata JSON parse
fixture confirms 5000-character budget, 7-turn small summary and 4-summary large summary
fixture confirms exact source ID allowlist is inserted before batch evidence
archive contains no empty index.js and therefore cannot overwrite the installed core
no storage deletion, history replay, API credential or worldbook schema change
limitations: the patch targets the known rc.3/rc.4 bundled core markers and stops when they do not match
provider-specific instruction following still requires a real SillyTavern summary run
custom thresholds other than the old defaults 15/6 are intentionally preserved

root_causes: large small-summary inputs increase source-ID copying and fabrication errors
the prompt showed valid IDs inside long evidence sections rather than as a single explicit allowlist
old default thresholds could remain persisted after an overlay update
hotfix.data_migration: one-time settings-only migration for exact old defaults 15/6
